skills.name: beamdrop
skills.description: Interact with a Beamdrop file storage server — upload, download, and manage files via the S3-compatible API. Use when the user wants to store files, create buckets, generate presigned/shareable URLs, manage API keys, set up webhooks, connect via MCP, or integrate Beamdrop into their project. Covers Go SDK, TypeScript/JavaScript SDK (npm package), HTTP API, presigned URL strategies, webhooks, MCP server, and error handling.
